mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_redmine_token (user_id, token_enc, redmine_login, last_verified_at, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenEnc}, #{redmineLogin}, #{lastVerifiedAt}, #{createdAt}) ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET token_enc = excluded.token_enc, redmine_login = excluded.redmine_login, last_verified_at = excluded.last_verified_at
